change_summary: Shadow-audited liquidity-qualified undercut-and-reclaim reversal candidates across three fixed OHLCV windows without changing production universe or strategy code.
hypothesis: A liquidity-qualified undercut-and-reclaim reversal shadow source may surface scarce, replayable candidates with lower A/B same-day overlap and useful forward returns, distinct from recent continuation shadow sources and without changing production universe or strategy logic.
notes: Artifact: data/exp_20260426_060_universe_scout_undercut_reclaim.json. Candidate counts were 28/10/53 across late_strong/mid_weak/old_thin; same-day A/B overlap was 0% in all windows; 10d forward return was -0.08%/+6.69%/+1.52%. Decision: observed_only; not production-promotable because late_strong is flat-negative, outside-production count is zero due to snapshot limits, and reversal noise/survivorship risk is high.

locked_variables: liquidity-qualified undercut-and-reclaim reversal shadow candidate definition; no production universe changes
parameters.single_causal_variable: liquidity-qualified undercut-and-reclaim reversal shadow candidate definition
